CVEDetector: {"Source": "CVE FEED","Title": "CVE-2026-6378 - Maxi Blocks <= 2.1.9 - authenticated (author+) stored cross-site scripting via style card rest api","Content": "CVE ID :CVE-2026-6378Published : May 2, 2026, 4:16 a.m. | 1 hour, 22 minutes agoDescription :The Maxi Blocks plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Stored Cross-Site Scripting via the `/wp-json/maxi-blocks/v1.0/style-card` REST API endpoint in all versions up to, and including, 2.1.9 due to insufficient input sanitization and output escaping of the `sc_styles` parameter.
